objective: Train a model from broad source knowledge through instruction behavior, reasoning drills, domain-specific tasks, and preference alignment.
notes: Run stages in order unless you already have an instruction-tuned base model.
Use JSONL files under splits/train and splits/validation for training and evaluation.
The preference stage is DPO-style and expects prompt/chosen/rejected records.

stages.name: Foundation Continued Pretraining
stages.objective: Transfer broad source knowledge, docs, code, transcripts, and prepared corpora.
stages.trainer: TRL SFTTrainer or causal LM trainer with text field

stages.name: Instruction and Assistant Behavior SFT
stages.objective: Teach instruction following, coding, math, summarization, and task response formats.

stages.name: Evidence-Grounded and Procedural Reasoning
stages.objective: Teach explicit state/action/next_state style traces from transcript, Sudoku, math, and synthetic reasoning sources.
stages.trainer: Convert traces to chat SFT or use a custom trace objective

stages.name: Preference Alignment
stages.objective: Prefer grounded or higher-quality completions over rejected alternatives.

stages.name: Held-Out Evaluation
stages.objective: Evaluate on held-out/test/eval rows from source datasets.
